'''鈭歵-r-zh-v''' ('''katarzhevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queef|queef]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-r-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queef|queef]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-r-zh-v
|-
! Lemma
| katarzhevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitarzhevoko|thitarzhevoko]] || [[word:jitarzhevoko|jitarzhevoko]] || [[word:shitarzhevoko|shitarzhevoko]] || [[word:kitarzhevoko|kitarzhevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotarzhevoko|thotarzhevoko]] || [[word:jotarzhevoko|jotarzhevoko]] || [[word:shotarzhevoko|shotarzhevoko]] || [[word:kotarzhevoko|kotarzhevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
